info.title: MemoriesWeave API
info.description: Public API for MemoriesWeave — create beautiful shareable memory collections from photos and WhatsApp chat exports with AI-generated captions and custom HTML designs.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Current user account, credits, and usage

tags.name: Photos
tags.description: Photo upload, metadata, and AI processing

tags.name: Design & Content
tags.description: Async AI design and content generation (returns jobId)

tags.name: POD
tags.description: Print-on-demand design, content, and print file generation

get.summary: Get current user info and plan

200.description: Current user profile and subscription plan
Usage summary for current billing period
All workspaces owned by or shared with the current user

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned from a previous response

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of photos to return (1-100)

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Include photos taken on or after this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Include photos taken on or before this date (ISO 8601)

post.summary: Upload a photo to a workspace

file.description: Image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC). Max 25 MB.

dateTaken.description: Override the date the photo was taken (ISO 8601)

tags.description: Comma-separated list of tags to apply

201.description: Photo uploaded successfully. Status will be 'pending' until processed.

200.description: Photo details including caption, tags, and people

tags.description: Replace all tags with this list

people.description: Replace all tagged people with this list

example.caption: Summer barbecue with the whole family

delete.description: Soft-deletes the photo by moving it to trash. It can be restored within 30 days.

post.summary: Trigger AI captioning for a photo
post.description: Starts AI analysis and captioning. Costs credits based on the configured AI model. Returns a job ID to track progress.

model.description: AI model override (defaults to workspace setting)

photoIds.description: Photo IDs to include. If omitted, AI will select photos during generation.

dateFrom.description: Start date for photo selection range

dateTo.description: End date for photo selection range

example.title: Summer 2025
example.description: Our best moments from last summer

get.summary: Get rendered HTML for a memory
get.description: Returns the fully rendered, self-contained HTML document for the memory. Suitable for iframe embedding or PDF generation.

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the memory

get.description: Returns version history snapshots. Each snapshot captures the full HTML state at a point in time.

post.summary: Create a snapshot of the current memory state
Restore a memory from a snapshot
post.description: Replaces the current memory HTML with the snapshot's saved state. A new snapshot of the current state is automatically created before restoring.

autoSnapshotId.description: ID of the auto-created snapshot of the state before restore

post.description: Sends a natural language message to the AI design assistant, which generates or iterates on the memory's HTML layout. Costs credits. Returns a job ID for tracking.

model.description: AI model to use for design generation

example.message: Create a vintage scrapbook layout with 28 pages, warm earth tones, and handwritten-style fonts

post.description: Locks in the current HTML template for content filling. After approval, use the content endpoints to populate the template with photos and text.

slotCount.description: Number of fillable slots in the approved template

post.description: Sends a message to the AI content assistant for iterating on the memory's text content and photo placement. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

example.message: Make the captions more poetic and add date references from the conversations

post.description: Runs the complete generation pipeline: photo selection, template filling, and content generation in one step. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

photoIds.description: Explicit photo IDs. If omitted, AI selects photos based on memory settings.

post.description: Generates and appends new pages to an existing memory. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

instructions.description: Natural language instructions for the new pages

example.instructions: Add a section about our beach trip in July

post.description: Edits content or layout of existing pages via natural language instructions. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

pages.description: Page numbers to edit. If omitted, AI decides which pages to modify.

example.instructions: Replace the placeholder text with more personal anecdotes

post.summary: Fill a single page with content
post.description: Fills the template slots on a specific page with AI-generated content and selected photos. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

photoIds.description: Specific photo IDs to use on this page

post.description: Automatically fills all pages that have empty template slots with AI-selected photos and generated content. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

model.description: AI model override for content generation

200.description: Product details including variants and pricing

post.summary: Send a POD design chat message
post.description: Sends a design instruction for print-on-demand product layout. AI generates print-ready HTML optimized for the target product dimensions. Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

message.description: Design instruction for the print product

productId.description: Target product ID from the catalog

example.message: Design a photo book cover with a floral border and our family name in gold script

post.summary: Send a POD content chat message
post.description: Iterates on the print-on-demand product's content (photos, text placement). Costs credits. Returns a job ID.

message.description: Content instruction for the print product

example.message: Use photos from our wedding day and add a romantic quote on the back cover

post.description: Renders the POD design into high-resolution print files (PNG/PDF) suitable for the fulfillment provider. Returns a job ID.

dpi.description: Print resolution in dots per inch

get.description: Returns signed URLs for downloading the generated print files. URLs expire after 1 hour.
Returns WhatsApp conversation chunks for the workspace, ordered by date. Chunks are created during WhatsApp import processing.
Returns conversation chunks that fall within the specified date range.
Returns conversation chunks that reference or were sent near the time of the specified photo.

parameters.name: photoId
parameters.description: Photo ID to find surrounding conversations for

post.description: Generates a shareable URL for the memory. Optionally set a password or expiration.

password.description: Optional password to protect the share link

allowDownload.description: Whether viewers can download the memory as PDF

get.summary: List share links for a memory

delete.description: Deactivates the share link so it can no longer be accessed by viewers.

get.description: Returns recent async jobs for the current user, ordered by creation time (newest first).

post.description: Requests cancellation of a pending or running job. The job may complete before cancellation takes effect. Credits for partially completed work are still charged.

bearerAuth.description: API key issued from the MemoriesWeave dashboard. Format: `mw_sk_` followed by 32 hexadecimal characters.

Envelope.description: Standard response envelope wrapping all API responses

data.description: Response payload. Present on success, absent on error.

error.description: Error details. Present on failure, absent on success.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page of results

hasMore.description: Whether more results exist beyond the cursor

remaining.description: Remaining requests in the current window

resetAt.description: When the rate limit window resets

subscriptionCredits.description: Credits included with subscription plan (resets monthly)

hasConversationData.description: Whether WhatsApp conversations have been imported

dateTaken.description: Date the photo was taken (from EXIF or manual)

people.description: Names of people detected or tagged in the photo

status.description: Current state in the creation workflow

pageCount.description: Number of pages in the memory

hasCustomHtml.description: Whether custom HTML has been generated

sizeBytes.description: Size of the stored HTML snapshot

startDate.description: Timestamp of the first message in the chunk

endDate.description: Timestamp of the last message in the chunk

participants.description: Names of participants in this chunk

hasPhotos.description: Whether this chunk contains photo references

preview.description: First few lines of the conversation

expiresAt.description: When the link expires (null for never)

viewCount.description: Number of times the link has been viewed

progress.description: Progress from 0.0 to 1.0 (null if not trackable)

completedAt.description: When the job finished (success or failure)

error.description: Error message if the job failed

JobRef.description: Reference to an async job, returned when an operation is accepted for processing

jobId.description: Job ID to poll for status via GET /jobs/{id}

estimatedCredits.description: Estimated credit cost for this operation

error.message: Invalid or expired API key. Provide a valid key in the Authorization header as 'Bearer mw_sk_...'

Forbidden.description: Insufficient credits or plan does not allow this operation

error.message: This operation requires approximately 0.35 credits but your balance is 0.12. Top up at https://memoriesweave.com/billing

NotFound.description: Resource not found or not accessible

RateLimited.description: Too many requests. Retry after the time indicated in the Retry-After header.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after 23 seconds.
An unexpected error occurred. If the problem persists, contact support.
